segments.scene_description: The character walks across an open asphalt area between industrial hangar buildings under a clear blue sky. A tall metal communication tower stands in the distance as the character approaches, and mountains are visible on the horizon.

segments.scene_description: The character enters a vast parking lot filled with rows of colorful parked vehicles. Walking between the cars, the character approaches a large airport terminal building visible in the distance while navigating around stationary vehicles including a red van and various colored sedans.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sparse industrial airfield into a densely packed outdoor parking lot under a clear blue sky. It begins with the character walking across an open asphalt expanse between hangar buildings, moving toward a tall metal communication tower with mountains visible on the horizon. As the character advances, the open terrain shifts into a vast parking area filled with rows of colorful stationary vehicles. The camera then navigates between a red van and various colored sedans, following the character as the environment opens up to reveal a large airport terminal building in the distance.
